reconnect-server-restarting: The server is restarting. Reconnecting shortly.
reconnect-failed: Could not reconnect. Please log in again.
network-invalid-url: The server address is invalid. Use ws:// or wss://.
sv-disabled-announcement: Self-voicing off. Native screen reader mode active.
chat-input-label: Chat input. Turn on your screen reader here if you need native text entry.
chat-placeholder: Type a message, or /g message to send it globally
auth-register-required: Please enter a username, email, and password to register.
auth-reset-required: Please enter your email, reset code, and new password.
auth-request-failed: The request could not be completed.
auth-register-success: Registration successful! You can now log in with your credentials.
auth-forgot-success: An email with a 6-digit reset code has been sent to your address.
auth-account-clear-failed: Could not remove the saved account.
update-required-status: A newer app version is required: {value}.
update-required-message: A new version ({value}) is available. Choose Update to open the latest Android APK download. Cancel will close the app.
sounds-update-required-status: A newer sound pack is required: {value}.
sounds-update-required-message: Your bundled sounds are version {current}, but the server requires version {latest}. This mobile client cannot update sounds live, so update the APK to continue. Cancel will close the app.
logout-message: Do you want to log out and close PlayAural Mobile?
session-kicked: You were kicked from the server.
footer-gestures-line-1: The game has built-in gestures. Please turn off your screen reader after successfully connecting to the game for the best playing experience.
footer-gestures-line-2: 1-finger swipe moves between items. 2-finger swipe up goes back or opens the action menu. 2-finger swipe right opens chat. 2-finger swipe left opens history. 2-finger swipe down opens shortcuts. 2-finger tap stops speech. 3-finger tap repeats the last announcement. 3-finger triple-tap toggles self-voicing.
